---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new notebook, module, or feature
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the feature or enhancement.

## Problem It Solves
What learning gap or curriculum need does this address?

## Proposed Solution
How would you implement this? (e.g., a new notebook about topic X)

## Health Informatics Context
How does this relate to health informatics, clinical workflows, or EHR data?

## Example Use Case
Provide an example of how learners would benefit from this feature.

## Additional Notes
Any references, related issues, or additional information?
